name: Cooper's Old Time Pit Bar-B-Que
description: Famous for Big Chop pork chop and pit-smoked brisket.

name: Black's Barbecue
description: Legendary Lockhart family BBQ, rich smoky brisket and sausage.

name: Granzin Bar-B-Q
description: Local favorite meat-market style BBQ, pulled pork sandwiches.

name: Adobe Cafe
description: Classic combo plates, enchiladas, and margaritas. Great for groups.

name: El Tapatio
description: Downtown staple since 2006, big portions of fajitas and enchiladas.

name: Lupe Tortilla
description: Sizzling fajitas, scratch tortillas, and a lively bar.

name: Alpine Haus
description: Upscale German in a 160-year-old house. Schnitzel, bratwurst, sauerbraten.

name: Krause's Cafe
description: Huge tap wall, jaeger schnitzel, beer garden with live music.

name: Faust Brewing Company
description: On-site brewed lagers and IPAs with hearty pub fare.

name: NB Brewing Company
description: Sour wheat beers and experimental brews, cozy taproom.

name: Huisache Grill
description: Contemporary American bistro with courtyard, solid wine list.

name: McAdoo's Seafood
description: Gulf seafood in a historic post office building. Cocktails.

name: Gristmill River Restaurant
description: Iconic riverside spot near Gruene Hall, chicken-fried steak.

name: Gruene River Grill
description: River-view comfort food near Gruene Hall, family-friendly.
